title: Agent Harness explained in 8min..
summary: Video explaining agent harness engineering as an evolution of prompt and context engineering approaches for agentic systems. Covers the progression from basic prompt engineering through context engineering to harness engineering, including architectural considerations and looping mechanisms for agents.
